requirements.title: Pointer Descriptor Structure
requirements.description: The pointer module shall define a pointer trait (JUNO_POINTER_T) containing an API vtable pointer, memory address, size, and alignment.
requirements.rationale: A fat pointer descriptor enables type-safe, size-aware memory access so that data structures can operate on arbitrary element types without unsafe void-pointer arithmetic.

requirements.title: Pointer Copy
requirements.description: The pointer API shall copy the value referenced by a source descriptor into a destination descriptor's storage location.
requirements.rationale: Copy is the fundamental value-transfer operation for data structures, enabling element insertion and extraction without exposing raw memory addresses to callers.

requirements.title: Pointer Reset
requirements.description: The pointer API shall reset the memory at a pointer descriptor to a defined empty state.
requirements.rationale: Reset provides a deterministic way to clear memory slots, ensuring that data structures can return elements to a known-empty state without leaking stale data.

requirements.title: Pointer Descriptor Validation
requirements.description: The pointer module shall validate that a pointer descriptor's API, address, and size are non-null/non-zero.
requirements.rationale: Validates descriptor integrity at runtime to ensure memory safety before any copy or reset operation dereferences the address.

requirements.title: Pointer Type Verification
requirements.description: The pointer module shall verify that a pointer descriptor's size and alignment match an expected type.
requirements.rationale: Verifying size and alignment against an expected type catches type mismatches at runtime, preventing silent memory corruption when descriptors are used with the wrong element type.
